raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.0,"R1.2":0.0,"R1.3":0.0,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.0,"R1.6":1.0,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":0.3,"RX.2":0.3,"RX.3":0.3,"RX.4":0.3,"RX.5":0.3},"active_set":["R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"rationale":{"R1.6":"The delegation 'Clean this up' directly requests improvements to the writing quality, focusing on grammar, flow, and conciseness at the sentence and paragraph levels.","RX.1":"Uncertainty disclosure is a peripheral responsibility in cleaning up the draft to ensure any limitations are appropriately highlighted.","RX.2":"Overclaim avoidance is peripheral to the cleanup task, helping to refine statements for accuracy without exaggeration.","RX.3":"Scope adherence ensures the cleaned text remains focused on the described framework without unnecessary expansions.","RX.4":"Downstream-harm avoidance is peripheral, considering potential misuses of the causal inference tool in the draft.","RX.5":"Provenance and traceability is peripheral to maintain accurate attribution in the cleaned citations and descriptions."}}

rationale.R1.6: The delegation 'Clean this up' directly requests improvements to the writing quality, focusing on grammar, flow, and conciseness at the sentence and paragraph levels.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty disclosure is a peripheral responsibility in cleaning up the draft to ensure any limitations are appropriately highlighted.
rationale.RX.2: Overclaim avoidance is peripheral to the cleanup task, helping to refine statements for accuracy without exaggeration.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence ensures the cleaned text remains focused on the described framework without unnecessary expansions.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance is peripheral, considering potential misuses of the causal inference tool in the draft.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability is peripheral to maintain accurate attribution in the cleaned citations and descriptions.
